title: Korbond 1000 m Thread, Black
description: From the manufacturer Korbond Care & Repair 1000m Thread 1000m Korbond 1000m Thread comes in either Black or White and has excellent colour fastness and is ideal for general sewing applications. The polyester coated core ensures consistent performance for a number of frequent care and repair applications. Polyester Thread has a small amount of 'give' so can be used on stretch and knit fabrics Strong & Durable Large Quantity Hand and Machine Sewing Handy usages for Korbond Care & Repair 1000m Black Thread Sewing Machine A strong polyester thread suitable for all types of sewing projects; heavy denim, or upholstery, and unlike cotton threads, polyester won’t shrink or lose colour when machine washed or tumble dried. Darning A true all-purpose thread. Unlike cotton, polyester has some give to it, making it suitable for darning stretchy knits, repairing tears or holes in clothes, and general mending around the home. Upcycling Polyester is more durable than natural fibre threads, making it the right choice for sewing different materials, e.g. a natural and synthetic fabric together. Also for adding embellishments, beads and buttons to your project. Back To School Alterations Polyester is a good all-round thread, strong and versatile, ideal for hemming school skirts and trousers, mending holes and tears in uniforms, and darning cardigans, jumpers and tights.
